title: CTOV -  Monobank compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Monobanks mod
body:
# No longer needed in latest version of CTOV for 1.20 and 1.21
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Monobank. You will find some banks in village. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Monobank mod**

Monobank mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/monobank)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
